front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — plugin self-development (Markdown + stdlib Python + pytest). No product frontend/backend layers, no live app, no dev API. The PRODUCT gains single-source-of-truth + drift guards; the plugin's own verification surface is the pytest suite.

entries.source_excerpt: one stdlib-only module exporting the rule enumerations that were duplicated as literals
scenarios: module imports cleanly and exposes the four names
the constants carry the documented values
acceptance_criteria: hooks/shared_rule_constants.py imports with no side effects and exposes FORBIDDEN_GIT_OPERATIONS, ACTION_KIND_VALUES, TEST_FAILURE_ORIGINS, PARITY_VERBS
PARITY_VERBS == the 6 parity verbs; FORBIDDEN_GIT_OPERATIONS covers the 6 forbidden ops; ACTION_KIND_VALUES == the 7 action kinds

pipeline-completion-audit derives test-failure origins from the shared module
acceptance_criteria: vao_tools.py sources its forbidden-git-op set from shared_rule_constants.FORBIDDEN_GIT_OPERATIONS (no duplicate literal)
pipeline-completion-audit.py TEST_FAILURE_ORIGINS is the shared constant (imported)
all pre-existing vao_tools + completion-audit tests pass unchanged

entries.source_excerpt: the parity-verb list SHALL have a single authoritative source ... source-of-truth header comment ... consistency test

a consistency test pins the inline lists to the constant
acceptance_criteria: prompt-refiner.md, bug-classifier.md, system-architect.md, oracle-deriver.md each carry a source-of-truth comment referencing common-pipeline-conventions ## Scope discipline
the consistency test asserts every PARITY_VERBS verb appears in each of the 4 agents; canonical ## Scope discipline prose unchanged

scenarios: a canonical source exists for the three blocks
acceptance_criteria: the canonical text of each of the 3 blocks is defined in exactly one place
scripts/setup/sync_agent_boilerplate.py run against a synced tree makes no changes and reports zero drift

entries.source_excerpt: drift guard asserting every standard agent's copy of each shared block is byte-identical to canonical
scenarios: the drift guard passes on the synced tree
the drift guard fails on injected drift
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_agent_boilerplate_sync.py collects >=1 test per shared block and passes
variants (adversarial-reviewer, oracle-deriver, interaction-observer) are allowlisted; injected drift in any standard agent fails the test

entries.source_excerpt: zero behavior change ... full pytest suite SHALL pass

scenarios: the suite is green after consolidation

no discipline's enforcement semantics changed (master-review audit overall: pass)
